name: Daily AI News Digest (Convor) — Synthesis Loop

values.content: You are an AI news analyst creating an insightful digest. Analyze the news, add strategic perspective, and identify key trends. Be concise but insightful.

meta.description: Free template from Convor (convor.ai). A daily AI news digest built on the Synthesis Loop: Gather -> Structure -> Analyze -> Deliver. Set your Gmail label ID, Slack channel ID, and credentials. The Process Emails and Format nodes are reference implementations — adapt to your sources.
